name: Banana Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Beat in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add the egg, mashed bananas, and oats; mix well.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips and walnuts.
5. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto greased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 375°F for 13 - 15 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Cool on wire racks.
